name: chokepoint-aitm-relay
bodyMarkdown:
# AiTM WebSocket Kit Relay — Detection Chokepoint

**Priority:** CRITICAL | **Tactic:** Credential Access | **Difficulty:** MEDIUM | **Prevalence:** HIGH
**Techniques:** T1539, T1078.004

## Overview
AiTM kits operate server-side WebSocket proxies relaying auth flows to Microsoft/Google in real time. Server-to-server HTTP calls leave Node.js user agents on sign-in events.

## Chokepoint Stages

### 1. Kit Relay Sign-In (Node.js UA)
Kit's Node.js process makes HTTP calls to Microsoft/Google.
Observable: Entra ID SigninLogs: resultType=0 AND userAgent contains node/axios/undici/node-fetch AND appDisplayName contains OfficeHome/Auth Broker.

### 2. Two-Tier ASN Transition
Cloud-VPS (relay) + residential (operator) for same UPN within 20min.
Observable: SigninLogs with cloud-VPS ASN + residential ASN for same UPN.

## Variations (2 tracked)
Tycoon 2FA (Storm-1747, ~62% of AiTM phishing), EvilProxy.

## Detection Logic
- **Hunt:** Node.js UA on Entra sign-in to high-value M365 apps
- **Analyst:** Two-tier ASN correlation (cloud-VPS + residential) for same UPN within 20min
